description_long: This object is a vintage Macintosh Classic computer monitor, characterized by its boxy, off-white plastic enclosure and integrated monochrome CRT display. The front features a prominent screen with a thick bezel, below which is the 'Macintosh Classic' branding and a small Apple logo. The rear panel includes various ports for connectivity, a power socket, ventilation grilles, and molded product information. The sides are plain with subtle panel lines and ventilation slots near the base. The top is flat with a recessed handle-like feature, and the overall design is utilitarian, reflecting late 1980s to early 1990s computer aesthetics.
description: A vintage Macintosh Classic computer monitor with a boxy off-white plastic body, integrated CRT display, and visible rear ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the CRT screen, thick bezel, Apple logo, and Macintosh Classic branding.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, slightly textured surface with panel lines and lower ventilation slots.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing multiple connectivity ports, power socket, ventilation grilles, and molded product information.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with plain surface, panel lines, and lower ventilation slots.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, flat, and made of off-white plastic, with squared corners and a matte finish. It is visually prominent and frames the display area with no color contrast or decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor has an integrated flat base that is part of the main enclosure, extending slightly forward and backward for stability. It is molded from the same plastic as the body and does not appear to be adjustable.
attribute_button_placement: A single button is visible on the lower right front bezel, positioned just below the screen.
attribute_port_visibility: Multiple ports are visible on the rear panel, including at least three data ports, a power socket, and audio jacks.
attribute_brand_logo: An Apple logo is present on the lower left front bezel, featuring a colored apple icon next to the 'Macintosh Classic' text.
